hooks.command: python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get("tool_input",{}).get("file_path",""); (sys.stderr.write("BLOCKED: server/core/ is HUMAN ONLY (Manual Brain rule). See AGENTS.md.\n"), sys.exit(2)) if "server/core/" in p else sys.exit(0)'

for f in .claude/commands/*.md; do name=$(basename "$f"); wf=".windsurf/workflows/$name"; [ -f "$wf" ] || { echo "DRIFT: $wf missing"; continue; }; diff <(sed '/^---$/,/^---$/d' "$f") <(sed '/^---$/,/^---$/d' "$wf") >/dev/null || echo "DRIFT: $name differs between .claude/commands and .windsurf/workflows"; done
